/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/project-qd_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/protocol.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/coordinator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/worker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/taskrunner.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/project-qd.dir/queue_sync.cpp.o" -o project-qd  /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Sql.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
